name: Dream Finders Homes, Inc.
summary: Company Overview We design, build and sell homes primarily in high-growth markets using our asset-light lot acquisition strategy. Our primary focus is on constructing and selling single-family homes across entry-level, first-time move-up, second-time move-up and active adult homes. We also sell homes to third-party investors that intend to lease the homes (built-for-rent contracts). Our home offerings are marketed under various brands, including Dream Finders Homes, DF Luxury, Reverie Active Adu...
